title: Bistek Tagalog
description: A classic Filipino dish made with thinly sliced beef, onions, and a hint of patis. This recipe is a simple and flavorful take on the traditional bistek tagalog.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Remove beef from pan and set aside.
Add more oil if necessary, then sauté onions until caramelized, about 5 minutes.
Add patis and stir to combine.
Return beef to pan and pour in patis mixture.
Simmer for 2-3 minutes, or until sauce has thickened.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with sliced onions and a sprinkle of black pepper.
